name: Carlos Alomar
abstract: Carlos Alomar (born 7 May 1951) is a Puerto Rican guitarist. He is best known for his work with David Bowie from the mid-1970s to the early 2000s, having played on more Bowie albums than any other musician.

concerts.label: Benefit: Kipp Academy
